recording.descriptionEnd: . We assess how you work, not just the end result.

workOutside.strong: You're expected to work outside SkillVee.

screenRecord.strong: We record your screen the whole time

hero.title: Watch a candidate complete
hero.subtitle: This is what your hiring team sees after a candidate finishes. Real conversations. Real work. Real signal.

timeline.title: A realistic day at work—not algorithm puzzles
timeline.subtitle: Candidates experience what the job actually feels like. You see how they actually work.

step1.title: Gather Requirements
step1.description: Candidate joins a kickoff call with their AI manager, then chats with stakeholders to clarify the task. Great candidates ask smart questions. Others dive in blind. You'll see the difference.

step2.title: Do the Actual Work
step2.description: Build the feature, analyze the data, create the roadmap—whatever the role requires. Screen is recorded. AI tools are encouraged. We want to see how they really work.

step3.title: Present and Defend
step3.description: Submit the work and face questions. The AI pushes back on decisions. Do they defend good ideas? Accept valid criticism? Fold at the first sign of disagreement?

features.title: Everything you need to make the decision
features.subtitle: Not just a score. Actual evidence of how they work.

recording.title: Screen Recording
recording.text: Watch their entire process if you want.

aiUsage.title: AI Tool Usage
aiUsage.text: Do they use AI thoughtfully or blindly copy-paste?

feedback.title: Handling Feedback
feedback.text: How do they respond to pushback? Defend ideas when right?

communication.title: Communication
communication.text: Can they explain their work clearly and professionally?

comparison.title: There's a better way to hire

signalQuality.skillveeWay: High-fidelity signals from real work simulations.

candidateExperience.title: Candidate Experience
candidateExperience.oldWay: Stressful, irrelevant algorithm tests and trivia questions.
candidateExperience.skillveeWay: Engaging, relevant tasks that showcase their skills.

timeToHire.title: Time to Hire
timeToHire.oldWay: Weeks of scheduling and multiple interview rounds.

bias.title: Bias
bias.oldWay: Prone to unconscious bias and 'culture fit' assessment.
bias.skillveeWay: Standardized, objective evidence for every candidate.

q1.question: How long does it take to set up a simulation?
q1.answer: Most simulations are ready in under 5 minutes. Paste your job description, review the generated scenario, customize if needed, and you're ready to send to candidates. No weeks of test design required.

q2.question: Can I customize the simulation for my specific role?
q2.answer: Yes. The AI generates a baseline from your JD, but you can customize the scenario, stakeholder personas, specific tasks, and evaluation criteria. Enterprise plans include white-glove simulation design support.

q3.question: How do candidates feel about this vs. traditional interviews?
q3.answer: Candidates consistently rate Skillvee higher than algorithm tests. They appreciate that it's relevant to the actual job, respects their time (30-45 min vs. multi-hour interviews), and lets them show their real skills—not trivia recall.

q4.question: What if a candidate has technical issues?
q4.answer: Candidates can pause and resume. If issues persist, they can contact support. All sessions are saved automatically, so no work is lost. We also provide a pre-flight check before they start.

cta.title: READY TO UPGRADE
cta.subtitle: Get a personalized demo or try a sample assessment as a candidate.

question1.question: How long does the assessment take candidates?
question1.answer: 30-45 minutes. Candidates complete the simulation in one sitting—no scheduling required. They get a link, complete the work, and you get results.

question2.question: Can candidates cheat with AI?
question2.answer: We encourage AI use—that's how people actually work in 2025. What matters is how they use it. Our real-time voice conversations are unfakeable—candidates can't rehearse, script, or have someone else take the call. Combined with screen recordings of their entire process, you see the real person, not just polished output.

question3.question: Can we customize the simulation for our role?
question3.answer: Yes. Paste your job description and we generate a simulation tailored to your specific role, tech stack, and company context. No generic tests—candidates work on scenarios that match what they'd actually do on day one.

question4.question: What ATS integrations do you support?
question4.answer: We integrate with major ATS platforms including Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, and Workday. Results sync automatically to candidate profiles. Don't see yours? Contact us—we're adding new integrations regularly.

question5.question: Is this fair for all candidates?
question5.answer:
More fair than traditional interviews. Think about what candidates face today: being judged on appearance, nervousness, and interviewer mood. Subjective "culture fit" assessments. Advantages for people who interview well but work poorly.

With SkillVee, every candidate gets the identical scenario. No power dynamics, no surprise questions, no bias. They choose when to complete it, use their preferred tools, and their work speaks for itself. We measure what people actually do—not how they perform under artificial pressure.

question6.question: What about candidate privacy?
question6.answer:
Candidates know exactly what's being evaluated—there's no hidden scoring or secret criteria. They see the same materials reviewers see. Compare this to traditional interviews where candidates have no idea what's being written about them, or personality tests with opaque algorithms.

Our approach is transparent by design: candidates demonstrate real skills, reviewers see real work, and everyone knows the rules upfront.

cta.title: STOP GUESSING.
cta.subtitle: See exactly how candidates perform before you make the offer.

hero.title: Start free.
hero.subtitle: No per-assessment fees, no surprises. Upgrade when you need more capacity.

question1.question: What counts as an assessment?
question1.answer: Each unique candidate who completes a work simulation counts as one assessment. You can send unlimited invitations.

question2.question: What happens if I exceed my monthly limit?
question2.answer: We'll notify you when you're approaching your limit. You can upgrade anytime, or purchase additional assessments at $10 each.

question3.question: Do unused assessments roll over?
question3.answer: Monthly allocations reset each billing cycle. Annual plans get a 20% bonus and more flexibility.

cta.title: NOT SURE WHICH PLAN?
cta.subtitle: Start with Free and upgrade when you need more capacity. Or schedule a demo to see how it works.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At Skillvee, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our service.

informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, participate in assessments, or contact us for support.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.content: We use the information we collect to:

items.3: Communicate with you about our services
items.4: Ensure platform security and prevent fraud

dataSharing.title: Information Sharing
dataSharing.content: We do not sell or rent your personal information. We may share your information in the following circumstances:

items.1: With employers when you apply for positions
items.2: With service providers who assist our operations
items.3: When required by law or legal process

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@skillvee.com

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Skillvee, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

useOfService.title: Use of Service
useOfService.content: You may use our service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You agree not to use our service:

items.1: In any way that violates applicable laws
items.2: To transmit harmful or malicious code

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.content: When you create an account, you must provide accurate and complete information. You are responsible for:

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by Skillvee and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

userContent.title: User Content
userContent.content: By submitting content to our service, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, and distribute your content in connection with the service.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.content: Your use of our service is also governed by our Privacy Policy. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand our practices.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to the service immediately, without prior notice, for any reason, including breach of these Terms.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers
disclaimers.content: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Skillvee shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United States, without regard to conflict of law provisions.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Terms on this page.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal@skillvee.com

candidateTerms.title: SkillVee Candidate Terms of Service
candidateTerms.intro: This Agreement is made between the individual using our platform ('Candidate') and SkillVee Corporation ('SkillVee'). Candidates may access interview practice, skill validation, and job placement services through our AI-powered platform.

platformUsage.title: 1. Platform Usage and Account
platformUsage.intro: Candidates agree to use the SkillVee platform for legitimate career development and job-seeking purposes. By creating an account, you warrant that:

bullets.0: All information provided is accurate and truthful
bullets.1: You are the authorized owner of your credentials and work samples
bullets.2: You will maintain the security of your account credentials
bullets.3: You will not share your account with others or create multiple accounts

assessmentConduct.title: 2. Assessment and Interview Conduct
assessmentConduct.intro: When participating in assessments, practice interviews, or company evaluations, Candidates agree to:

bullets.0: Complete assessments independently without unauthorized assistance
bullets.1: Consent to screen and audio/video recording during evaluation sessions
bullets.2: Represent their own skills and experience authentically
bullets.3: Not attempt to manipulate, cheat, or circumvent the AI evaluation systems
bullets.4: Maintain professional conduct during all platform interactions

platformExclusive.title: 3. Platform-Exclusive Communications
platformExclusive.body1: When introduced to a Company through SkillVee, Candidates agree to conduct all initial communications, interview scheduling, and hiring discussions exclusively through the SkillVee platform.
platformExclusive.body2: This includes refraining from directly contacting Companies outside the platform until a formal offer has been extended and the placement has been properly recorded through SkillVee.

nonCircumvention.title: 4. Non-Circumvention Agreement
nonCircumvention.body1: SkillVee invests significant resources in connecting Candidates with employment opportunities. Candidates acknowledge this investment and agree not to circumvent the platform when engaging with Companies introduced through SkillVee.
nonCircumvention.body2: For a period of 12 months following an introduction to a Company through SkillVee, Candidates agree not to:

bullets.0: Directly apply to or contact the Company outside the platform to circumvent placement fees
bullets.1: Accept employment with the Company without completing the SkillVee placement process
bullets.2: Refer other candidates to the Company as a means of circumvention

nonCircumvention.body3: Violations may result in account termination and legal action to recover applicable placement fees.

dataPrivacy.title: 5. Data Usage and Privacy
dataPrivacy.intro: By using SkillVee, Candidates consent to the collection and use of their data as follows:

bullets.0: Profile information, resume, and portfolio materials may be shared with Companies for evaluation purposes
bullets.1: Assessment recordings, screen captures, and AI-generated insights become part of your SkillVee profile
bullets.2: Anonymized performance data may be used to improve our AI systems and platform
bullets.3: Communication logs within the platform may be reviewed for quality assurance and dispute resolution

dataRights.title: 6. Your Rights to Your Data
dataRights.intro: Candidates retain the following rights regarding their personal data:

bullets.0: Request access to all data SkillVee holds about you
bullets.2: Request deletion of your account and associated data (subject to legal retention requirements)
bullets.3: Withdraw consent for future data processing (may limit platform functionality)
bullets.4: Export your profile data in a portable format

dataRights.note: Data deletion requests will be processed within 30 days. Note that some data may be retained for legal compliance or ongoing business obligations with Companies.

intellectualProperty.title: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.intro: Candidates retain ownership of their original work, including code samples, portfolio pieces, and other materials submitted to the platform. However, by submitting materials, Candidates grant SkillVee a license to:

bullets.0: Display materials to Companies for evaluation purposes
bullets.1: Use anonymized code samples to improve AI assessment systems
bullets.2: Store and process materials as necessary for platform operation

freeServices.title: 8. Free Services and Paid Features
freeServices.body: SkillVee provides core interview practice and job placement services at no cost to Candidates. Premium features, enhanced visibility, or additional services may be offered for a fee and will be clearly disclosed before purchase.

bullets.0: Provide false or misleading information about their qualifications
bullets.1: Use automated tools to interact with the platform without authorization
bullets.2: Attempt to access other users' accounts or data
bullets.3: Share confidential assessment content or Company information with third parties
bullets.4: Use the platform for any unlawful purpose

termination.title: 10. Account Termination
termination.intro: Either party may terminate this agreement at any time. Candidates may delete their account through account settings. SkillVee may terminate accounts for violations of these terms. Upon termination:

bullets.0: Non-circumvention obligations remain in effect for the specified period
bullets.1: Data will be deleted per our retention policy unless legally required otherwise
bullets.2: Access to the platform and all services will be revoked

liability.title: 11. Limitation of Liability
liability.body: SkillVee provides the platform "as is" and does not guarantee employment outcomes. We are not responsible for hiring decisions made by Companies, interview outcomes, or career impacts resulting from platform use. Our liability is limited to the fees paid by the Candidate, if any, in the 12 months preceding any claim.

modification.title: 12. Modification of Terms
modification.body: SkillVee reserves the right to modify these Terms of Service with 30 days notice to Candidates via email or platform notification. Continued use of the platform after the notice period constitutes acceptance of revised terms.

governingLaw.title: 13. Governing Law and Disputes
governingLaw.body: This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of California, USA. Any disputes will be resolved through binding arbitration, with the prevailing party entitled to reasonable attorneys' fees.

footer.acknowledgement: By using SkillVee's platform, you acknowledge acceptance of these Terms of Service and agree to be legally bound by their provisions.

metadata.title: FAQ - Work Simulation Assessments for Technical Hiring
metadata.description: Get answers about Skillvee's work simulation platform. Learn how to assess candidates with realistic job tasks, pricing, integration, and more.

hero.label: Got Questions?
hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about using Skillvee to hire better

q1.question: How does Skillvee work?
q1.answer: Paste your job description. We generate a realistic work simulation. Send the link to candidates. They complete a 30-45 minute simulation on their own time. You review how they actually performed—their communication, execution, and problem-solving approach.

q2.question: How long does it take to get started?
q2.answer: About 5 minutes. Paste your JD, review the generated simulation, and you're ready to send links to candidates. No lengthy onboarding or training required.

q3.question: What roles does Skillvee support?
q3.answer: Any role where you want to see how candidates actually work. We support technical roles (Software Engineers, Data Scientists), business roles (Product Managers, Program Managers), and customer-facing roles (Sales, Contact Center, Customer Success). Each simulation is tailored to your specific job description—not pulled from a generic test library.

q4.question: Can I customize the simulation scenarios?
q4.answer: Yes. We generate simulations based on your job description. Enterprise customers can work with us to create fully custom scenarios that match your team's specific challenges and tech stack.

q1.question: What do candidates actually do in a simulation?
q1.answer: They experience a realistic first day: meet their "manager," gather requirements from AI-powered stakeholders, complete a work task, and defend their approach. It's 30-45 minutes of real work—not algorithm puzzles that nobody uses after the interview.

q2.question: Can candidates use AI tools like ChatGPT?
q2.answer: Yes—we encourage it. In real work, people use AI tools. We want to see how candidates use them: thoughtfully or blindly? Do they verify the output? Can they explain what the AI generated? This is the skill that actually matters now.

q3.question: How do you prevent cheating?
q3.answer: We flip the model. Traditional tests try to ban AI and hope no one cheats. With live stakeholder conversations and 30-45 minutes of continuous work, there's nothing to cheat on. You can't fake real work with real-time interactions.

q4.question: What's the candidate experience like?
q4.answer: Candidates consistently prefer work simulations to algorithm tests. They get to show actual skills instead of memorized trivia. And they walk away understanding what the job would actually be like—a better experience for everyone.

q5.question: How long do assessments take?
q5.answer: 30-45 minutes. Long enough to see real work, short enough to respect everyone's time. Candidates complete it asynchronously—no scheduling coordination needed.

q1.question: What do I see in the results?
q1.answer: You see how candidates actually worked: how they gathered requirements, used AI tools, executed the task, communicated their approach, and handled pushback. Not just a score—actual evidence of how they'll perform on day one.

q2.question: How does AI-powered evaluation work?
q2.answer: Our AI analyzes the full simulation—conversations, work output, and decision defense. It scores on communication, technical execution, problem-solving approach, and fit. Every candidate gets the same criteria, removing human reviewer inconsistency.

q3.question: Can I compare candidates easily?
q3.answer: Yes. Same scenario for every candidate means you can directly compare how different people approached the same problem. Apples to apples—not apples to algorithm test scores.

q4.question: How do you reduce bias in hiring?
q4.answer: Same scenario for every candidate. AI-powered scoring removes human reviewer inconsistency. We measure what people actually do, not what their resume says or where they went to school. Work speaks for itself.

q1.question: Does Skillvee integrate with our ATS?
q1.answer: Enterprise customers get ATS integration with major platforms including Greenhouse, Lever, and Ashby. Contact us for specific integration requirements.

q2.question: Is candidate data secure?
q2.answer: Yes. We're SOC 2 compliant. Assessment data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We don't sell candidate data to third parties. You control who sees results.

q3.question: Can we use our own branding?
q3.answer: Enterprise customers can white-label the candidate experience with their company logo and branding.

q4.question: What browsers and devices work?
q4.answer: Skillvee works on all modern browsers (Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge) on desktop. We recommend desktop for the best candidate experience during simulations.

cta.label: Still Have Questions?
cta.title: LET'S TALK.
cta.subtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? We'll answer your questions and show you how it works.

metadata.title: Validate Your Skills | Skillvee

frontend_engineer.name: Frontend Engineer
frontend_engineer.description: Build and maintain web/mobile UI; optimize performance; ensure accessibility.

backend_engineer.name: Backend Engineer
backend_engineer.description: Build scalable services; design APIs; manage data pipelines.

fullstack_engineer.name: Full Stack Engineer
fullstack_engineer.description: Combine frontend and backend skills; integrate systems; deliver features end-to-end.

tech_lead.name: Tech Lead / Architect
tech_lead.description: Define architecture; guide engineering teams; ensure maintainability and technical strategy.

devops_sre.name: DevOps / SRE Engineer
devops_sre.description: Build CI/CD pipelines; monitor systems; optimize infrastructure and reliability.

growth_pm.name: Growth Product Manager
growth_pm.description: Optimize acquisition, activation, and retention through experimentation and data-driven decisions.

platform_pm.name: Platform Product Manager
platform_pm.description: Build internal platforms, developer tools, and infrastructure products that serve other teams.

core_pm.name: Core Product Manager
core_pm.description: Own a product area end-to-end — define strategy, manage roadmap, ship features, measure outcomes.

analytics_engineer.name: Analytics Engineer
analytics_engineer.description: Build data pipelines, maintain data models, and create reliable datasets for analysis.

data_analyst.name: Data Analyst
data_analyst.description: Analyze business data, create dashboards, and provide insights to drive decisions.

ml_engineer.name: ML Engineer
ml_engineer.description: Build and deploy machine learning models; feature engineering; optimization and research implementation.

technical_program_manager.name: Technical Program Manager
technical_program_manager.description: Coordinate complex technical programs across engineering, infrastructure, and platform teams.

business_program_manager.name: Business Program Manager
business_program_manager.description: Drive cross-functional business initiatives spanning product, marketing, operations, and go-to-market.

account_executive.name: Account Executive
account_executive.description: Full-cycle sales — prospect, qualify, present, negotiate, and close new business.

sales_development_rep.name: Sales Development Representative
sales_development_rep.description: Prospect and qualify leads; book meetings; build pipeline for account executives.

solutions_engineer.name: Solutions Engineer
solutions_engineer.description: Technical sales support — product demos, proof of concepts, and technical validation with prospects.

onboarding_specialist.name: Onboarding Specialist
onboarding_specialist.description: Guide new customers from purchase to productive use; ensure successful initial adoption.

customer_success_manager.name: Customer Success Manager
customer_success_manager.description: Own the ongoing customer relationship post-onboarding; drive retention, expansion, and advocacy.

renewals_manager.name: Renewals Manager
renewals_manager.description: Drive contract renewals; negotiate terms; identify and mitigate churn risks.

hero.subtitle: No leetcode. No whiteboard. Take a free AI-powered simulation that mirrors a real workday — talk to your manager, tackle a real task, and get a detailed skills report.

junior.label: Junior
junior.description: You're early in your career. The simulation focuses on executing well-defined tasks with some guidance available.

mid.label: Mid-Level
mid.description: You work independently on features. The simulation tests your ability to gather requirements and deliver end-to-end.

senior.label: Senior
senior.description: You own large areas and mentor others. Expect ambiguous requirements and cross-team coordination challenges.
expectations: Push back on scope when needed

staff.label: Staff+
staff.description: You drive technical strategy across teams. The simulation involves system design decisions and organizational influence.
expectations: Shape the problem, not just solve it

onePager.tagline: Work simulations that show who can actually do the job

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Hiring is broken in the AI era
problem.stat1: of resumes are now AI-written and look alike
problem.stat2: of candidates use AI during interviews
problem.calloutEmphasis: Can this person actually do the job?

solution.label: The Solution
solution.title: A 45-min simulation of the real job
solution.item1Desc: Voice conversations with PM, manager, and tech lead — with memory and context
solution.item2Desc: Candidates produce actual work output — code, PRs, and decisions
solution.item3Desc: Screen + voice recorded end-to-end, with scorecards, transcripts, and artifacts
solution.footer: Compare candidates side-by-side on real work.

whyNow.label: Why Now
whyNow.item1Desc: Real-time voice + context make realistic stakeholder conversations possible at scale.
whyNow.item2Desc: Analyze hour-long work sessions reliably — see how candidates actually work.
whyNow.footer: This was impossible 6 months ago. Now it works.

keyInsight.label: Key Insight
keyInsight.headline: Interviews are going away. The future of hiring is watching people work.
keyInsight.detail: Resumes, take-homes, and interviews are all gameable now. Watching real work isn't.

market.label: Market
market.comparablesText: Mercor ($10B), Juicebox ($850M) — AI solved sourcing. HackerRank ($500M, $221M rev) — the incumbent we replace. Evaluation is the missing layer.

moat.label: Moat
moat.introPre: Every simulation teaches us what "good" looks like
moat.introPost: . As we track which hires succeed, we can predict who will thrive where — not generically, but for each team specifically.
moat.footer: Competitors can copy the product. They can't copy the data. Starting with engineering, expanding to every white-collar role.

businessModel.label: Business Model
businessModel.intro: SaaS with freemium. Paid plans from $79/month to enterprise custom pricing.
businessModel.beachheadText: Engineering teams hiring 5+ developers/month — hardest roles to evaluate, highest cost of a bad hire. Expands to design, product, and all white-collar roles.

progress.label: Progress
progress.intro: Working prototype built. 2 committed pilots. Full simulation flow live — AI voice conversations, real coding environment, screen capture, and automated scorecards.
progress.stackText: Next.js, Supabase, Gemini Live (voice), Gemini Flash (evaluation). Built and shipping fast.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This includes your profile, all assessments, recordings, uploaded CVs, and reports.

pending.title: Deletion Scheduled
pending.description: Requested on {date}. Your account and all data will be permanently deleted within 30 days.

schedule.title: Schedule Deletion (30 days)
schedule.description: Your account will be marked for deletion. You have 30 days to change your mind before data is permanently removed.

immediate.title: Delete Immediately
immediate.description: Permanently delete your account and all data right now. This action cannot be undone.

confirm.errorMustType: Please type "DELETE MY ACCOUNT" to confirm

accountDeletion.successDeleted: Account deleted successfully. Redirecting to homepage...
